basic_details.job_title: BEL Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The latest Bharat Electronics (BEL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Medical Officer (E-II grade) post! Published on 23 April 2026 at www.bel-india.in, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum age limit of 32 years and possessing MBBS qualification with Medical Council registration and minimum 2 years relevant post-qualification experience can apply offline up to 15 May 2026. Find all details about the BEL Medical Officer new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for PwBD (with 40% disability) and Ex-Servicemen (ESM) as per Government of India guidelines. No relaxation in age/qualification for OBC(NCL)/SC/ST/EWS candidates applying against UR vacancy.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS (Pass class, recognized by Medical Council of India), Registered with Medical Council of India or any State Medical Council, Minimum 2 years relevant post-qualification experience
qualification.details: Qualification: MBBS (Pass class, recognized by Medical Council of India), Registered with Medical Council of India or any State Medical Council. Minimum 2 years relevant post-qualification experience. Experience in Industrial Establishment is desirable.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Medical Officer (E-II grade) on Fixed Term basis

salary_details.details: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 1,40,000 per month.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BEL Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the offline application form is 15th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized institution and be registered with the Medical Council of India or any State Medical Council. A minimum of 2 years of relevant post-qualification experience is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer (E-II grade) post is 32 years. Age relaxation will be provided to eligible categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 1,40,000 per month, as per the pay matrix.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: General and OBC category candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 400 plus 18% GST. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any relaxation in age for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for PwBD (with 40% disability) and Ex-Servicemen (ESM) as per Government of India guidelines. However, no relaxation is given for OBC(NCL)/SC/ST/EWS candidates applying against UR vacancies.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Bharat Electronics (BEL), which is www.bel-india.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The Medical Officer position is on a Contract basis, specifically on a Fixed Term basis.
